meta.note: End of Day Audits, stored by date. Nothing is overwritten across days - every day's audit is a permanent record.

reflection.largestWin: The Millers thanked me for catching a coverage gap.
reflection.largestLesson: I let the afternoon get away from me - protect the calendar.
reflection.better: Start the highest-value follow-up first, not last.
reflection.grateful: A healthy family and a business that helps people.
reflection.promise: Bed by 10:30 so I'm sharp tomorrow.
reflection.tomorrowPriority: Follow up with the group-policy lead.

2026-07-08.tonyAudit: Strong day, Jake. Business and consistency both high. The one thing to guard tomorrow is your afternoon - protect it for deep, high-value work.
